shot_type_and_framing: medium close-up with the marble tray of stacked sweets and a lit clay lamp centrally placed in the lower third of the frame
camera_movement: slow push-in focusing on the sweets and burning lamp, maintaining sharp focus on the subject
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a 50mm focal length style, shallow depth of field softly blurring the background sofa and decor
environment_description: warm, cozy indoor setting featuring a wooden table, beige sofa with patterned orange cushion, hanging garlands blurred in the background, and multiple lit clay lamps providing ambient light
subject_description: a neat pyramid stack of rectangular beige sweets placed on a white marble tray with golden legs, accompanied by a single burning clay lamp on the tray, surrounded by scattered orange flower petals on the wooden table
motion_behavior: natural flickering flame motion of the clay lamp, stable resting sweets and petals on the table with no abrupt motion
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, filmic tone with warm ambient hues and soft cozy textures
